an_month.text: ประจำเดือน

as_name.default: นางรวีวรรณ ช่อดอก

root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((tab.int_cal)::double precision) as thai_int_cal , tab.* from ( SELECT sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no) as member_name, ( case '!an_month!' when 1 then 'มกราคม' when 2 then 'กุมภาพันธ์' when 3 then 'มีนาคม' when 4 then 'เมษายน' when 5 then 'พฤษภาคม' when 6 then 'มิถุนายน' when 7 then 'กรกฎาคม' when 8 then 'สิงหาคม' when 9 then 'กันยายน' when 10 then 'ตุลาคม' when 11 then 'พฤศจิกายน' else 'ธันวาคม' end ) as month_thai, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.principal_balance, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.principal_balance)::double precision) as thai_principal_balance, PKA_LON_INTSRV.fp_calint (sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no, pka.to_date((sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.last_calcint_date + interval '30 day')::date),sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.principal_balance ,pka.to_date(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.last_calcint_date::date),'PL')+ sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.int_arrear as int_cal, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.period_payment, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.last_period, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no, pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no , 'X-XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_date, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.int_transfer_amount, '!as_letter_1!' as as_letter, (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name, '!as_name_1!'as as_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate , sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no) as collateral_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no) as group_collateral_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.loan_transfer_amount, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.period_payment as det_period_payment, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.period_payment)::double precision) as thai_det_period_payment, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.voucher_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as thai_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount)::double precision) as thai_period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.int_arrear, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.seq_no FROM sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail WHERE ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no = sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.transfer_doc_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( rtrim(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.ref_loan_doc_no) = rtrim(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no) ) AND ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no = 'T63000129' --and sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no = '034555' -- and ( ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no between '019007' and '019007' ) -- AND ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_date between '28/04/2020' and '28/04/2020' ) ) )tab

r_ktm_member_book_trans_loan_to_coll01_n.sql: SELECT substr((string_agg(' และ '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(collateral_no,('0')::text)), '' order by seq_no)),5) as desc_fp FROM sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head WHERE ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.transfer_doc_no = sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.transfer_doc_no = {0} ) )

SELECT sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.seq_no + 1 as row_memno, (CASE lag(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no,1,null)over( order by sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no ) WHEN sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as row_memno, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no) as collateral_name , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract FROM sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.transfer_doc_no = sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.transfer_doc_no = {0}) AND ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_status = '0' ) ) order by sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.seq_no
